# Vendored: @mariozechner/pi-agent-core@0.73.1 (dist only)

The agent-loop core from https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono, vendored so the
guest bundle can be rebuilt offline via `node js/build.mjs`. Only `dist/*.js`
and `package.json` are kept. License: the package's own (see pi-mono). The
built artifact is `crates/pocket-pi/js/agent.bundle.js`.
